subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens, cherished ones at the threshold of the Lord! The ladies of all regions shall ultimately be brought low, and the queens of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیزان عزیزان درگاه پروردگار بانوهای آفاق عاقبت ذلیل گردند و ملکات جهان
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @chastity and purity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
